notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Sean Burke. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Sean Burke.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Sean Burke. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras to 3rd. Throwing error by pitcher Sean Burke.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hays pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hays grounds out softly, pitcher Aaron Ashby to first baseman Jake Bauers. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Hays pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hays doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Brandon Lockridge. Colson Montgomery out at home on the throw, left fielder Brandon Lockridge to shortstop Joey Ortiz to catcher William Contreras.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Luisangel Acuña GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Everson Pereira out at 2nd. Luisangel Acuña out at 1st.
